mapper.select: SELECT id, username, position, remaining_vacation, is_admin, team, is_team_leader FROM vibe.users ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_admin = 2 THEN 0 WHEN is_admin = 1 THEN 1 WHEN is_team_leader = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE WHEN team IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN team = '1팀' THEN 1 WHEN team = '2팀' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END, username

SELECT id, username, position, remaining_vacation, is_admin, team, is_team_leader FROM vibe.users WHERE team = #{team} ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_admin = 2 THEN 0 WHEN is_admin = 1 THEN 1 WHEN is_team_leader = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, username
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.users (id, username, password, position, remaining_vacation, is_admin, team, is_team_leader) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remainingVacation,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.users WHERE team = #{team} AND is_team_leader = 1
